<p align="center">
  Full Sail Game Development graduate motivated to build meaningful software that helps and inspires others through impactful digital experiences.

  <img src="assets/profile-labels.svg" alt="Focus: Software Engineering. Background: Game Development. Status: Portfolio." width="760" />

<br />

<p align="left">
  <strong>
    <span style="font-size: 64px;">About</span>
  </strong>
</p>
<p align="center">
  <img src="assets/divider.svg" alt="" width="100%" />
</p>

- Software engineer with a B.A. in Game Development from Full Sail University.
- Focused on building responsive, accessible, and interactive software experiences.
- Core skills include semantic HTML, responsive CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, accessibility, API integration, Git/GitHub, browser DevTools, C++, C#, Unreal Engine, Unity, and Perforce.
- Bringing a game-development background in visual feedback, interaction design, debugging, and user-focused systems.

<br />
